violations.text: Utensils were observed stored in stagnant water between uses. Utensils between uses shall be stored in one of the following manners: in water that is maintained at 135 degrees Fahrenheit or more, in water with sufficient flow to flush particulates to the drain, or on a dry clean surface. Utensils were cleaned and sanitized then placed on a dry clean surface during the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/21/2026

Refrigerator door gaskets were observed in poor repair in the front service area low boy refrigerator. Refrigerator door gaskets shall be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 05/21/2026
An accumulation of ice buildup was observed in the walk-in freezer. Establishment is to run defrost on unit. New Violation. Correct By: 04/28/2026

The non-food contact surfaces of the ice machine have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Non-food contact surfaces must be cleaned to sight and touch. New Violation. Correct By: 12/31/2024
Water pipe was observed leaking into a container in the back room. Per PIC, maintenance is scheduled to come today. Establishment is to fix leak. New Violation. Correct By: 12/31/2024
The Floor has areas of low grout in the back prep area and kitchen. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 04/30/2025
The Floor has areas of low grout both behind the service counter and in the back prep area. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 05/21/2024
